channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Case For Arsenal's Martin Zubimendi As Premier League's Best Player
item.description: Here's why the Spanish midfielder has excelled in just his first year with Arsenal.

item.title: Kevin Harvick: A Fast Kyle Busch Is 'Dangerous' For NASCAR's Daytona 500 Field
item.description: Kyle Busch started the season on the right foot, earning pole position for the Daytona 500

item.title: K-State Coach Jerome Tang: 'These Dudes Don't Deserve To Wear This Uniform'
item.description: Kansas State coach Jerome Tang ripped his Wildcats apart after their embarrassing 91-62 home loss to Cincinnati.

item.title: Get To Know a College Basketball Mid-Major: Patriot League
item.description: A look at who's who and what they are playing for in the men's and women's college basketball mid-major Patriot League.

item.title: Let's Debate: Which Coach Won the 2026 Recruiting Cycle?
item.description: FOX Sportsâ college football experts break down the 2026 recruiting haul and the coaches, portal moves and surprises that shaped it.

item.title: Agent: Sochan joining Knicks after Spurs release
item.description: Free agent forward Jeremy Sochan, who was released by the Spurs, plans to sign with the Knicks after he clears waivers, his agent told ESPN.

item.title: Celebrini leads Canada's rout in Olympic hockey
item.description: Macklin Celebrini scored Canada's first goal in the return of NHL players to the Olympics and Jordan Binnington stopped all 26 shots he faced in a 5-0...

item.title: UNC star Wilson out with fractured left hand
item.description: North Carolina star Caleb Wilson, a projected top-five pick in the 2026 NBA draft, is out with no timetable for return after he suffered a fractured l...

item.title: Castellanos released, admits to beer in dugout
item.description: The Philadelphia Phillies have released outfielder Nick Castellanos, making him a free agent who can sign with any club for the league minimum.

item.title: Kim falls short in bid to win third straight gold
item.description: Chloe Kim fell short in her bid to become the first Olympic snowboarder to win three consecutive gold medals, finishing second to Choi Gaon of South K...
